Part.Source:
&HojeData = serverdate()
For Each Order tmpNFeCod //CAPA NOTA TEMPORARIA Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod &FilCodFat = tmpNfeFatFilCod
&tmpNfeEnvEml = tmpNfeEnvEml //ENVIAR EMAIL DA NOTA
&NfeVlrTotPro = tmpTotPro &NfeVlrTotFrt = tmpTotFrt &NfeVlrTotIpi = tmpTotIpi &NfeVlrTot = tmpTotNFe-tmpTotIcmDes
&NfeVlrTotSeg = tmpTotSeg &NfeVlrTotOutDsp = tmpTotOut &NfeVlrTotDsc = tmpTotDsc // &NfeVlrTotDsc += tmpTotFun &NfeVlrTotBasIcms = tmpTotBasIcm &NfeVlrTotIcms = tmpTotVlrIcm &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = tmpTotBasSt &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt = tmpVlrSt
&NfeQtdVol = tmpNfeQtdVol &NfeEspVol = tmpNfeEspVol
&NfePesLiq = tmpNfePesLiq &NfePesBrt = tmpNfePesBrt
&tmpManNfeDadAdi = tmpManNfeDadAdi &tmpAutNfeDadAdi = tmpAutNfeDadAdi
&tmpNfeChvRef = tmpNfeChvRef &tmpExpCidCod = tmpExpCidCod &tmpNfeFin = tmpNfeFin &NfeDI = tmpNfeDI
&NfeIndPres = tmpNfeIndPres &tmpNfeCliEntIs = tmpNfeCliEntIs
&TmpTotFun = tmpTotFun &tmpNroNfp = tmpNroNfp &tmpEmsNfp = tmpEmsNfp
&tmpMrkCnpj = tmpMrkCnpj &tmpMrkUser = tmpMrkUser Exit EndFOr
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod &FilPerFun = FilPerFun PedEspVol = &NfeEspVol PedQtdVol = &NfeQtdVol
&PedSts = PedSts
// Do Case //JDF valido na temporaria // CAse PedStsGer = Pedido_Gerado.Televendas and LctNfeIndPres <> '5' // &NfeIndPres = '3' //TELE ATENDIMENTO // Case PedStsGer = Pedido_Gerado.SMART and LctNfeIndPres <> '5' // VOLTEI PRA 9 pois o presencial fora do estabelecimento exige uma chave. de nfe? JDF // &NfeIndPres = '9' //PRESENCIAL FORA DO ESTABELECIMENTO // EndCase
//VERIFICA NOTA PENDENTE VerificaNotaDigitandoPedido.call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &FilCodFat, '55', &NfeCod, &NfeNum, &NfeSer)
if &NfeCod.IsEmpty() &NfeCod = UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Udp(domParCod.NOTAFISCAL, &EmpCod, &FilCodFat) &NfeNum = UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Udp(domParCod.NOTAFISCALNUM, &EmpCod, &FilCodFat)
RetornaSerieNF.Call(domParCod.NOTAFISCAL55_SERIE, &EmpCod, &FilCodFat, &serie) &NfeSer = trim(str(&serie)) Else ExcluirNfe.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCodFat, &NfeCod) if &NfeSer.IsEmpty() or &NfeSer = '0' RetornaSerieNF.Call(domParCod.NOTAFISCAL55_SERIE, &EmpCod, &FilCodFat, &serie) &NfeSer = trim(str(&serie)) Endif Endif
if PedStsGer = Pedido_Gerado.OrdemCarregamento &PedCodOciRef = PedCodOciRef Endif
if PedStsGer = Pedido_Gerado.AgruparFaturar //FROM JSON NAO MUDAR &sdtPedidos.FromJson(PedObsAna) Endif
retornaMarketplacePedido.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &sdtDadosNota)
New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCodFat NfeCod = &NfeCod NfeFilCod = &FilCod
NfePedCod = &PedCod
if &PedSts = status_Pedido.CANCELADO &tmpManNfeDadAdi += ' ' + PedObsNfe.Trim() &tmpManNfeDadAdi = &tmpManNfeDadAdi.Trim() Endif
NfeNum = &NfeNum NfeSer = &NfeSer NfeSts = Status_NFe.Digitando NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA
NfeCidExp = &tmpExpCidCod NfeFin = &tmpNfeFin NfeIndPres = &NfeIndPres NfeMrkCnpj = &tmpMrkCnpj NfeMrkUser = &tmpMrkUser
NfeDtaEms = &HojeData NfeDtaDsp = &HojeData NfeHorEms = SysTime() ModCod = '55' //NFe NfeTipFrt = PedTipFrt
If LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida or LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada NfeEntSai = LctAtuEst Else NfeEntSai = LctAtuSal EndIf
Do Case Case not PedCliGruImpLctCod.IsEmpty() and Not PedCliGruImpLctCod.IsNull() and LctTip = TipoLancamento.SaidaMercadoria NfeLctCod = PedCliGruImpLctCod Case NfeEntSai <> LctAtuSal and LctBasImpCod <> LctCod and LctBasImpCod > 0 NfeLctCod = LctBasImpCod Otherwise NfeLctCod = LctCod EndCase
If &tmpNfeEnvEml = true NfeEnvEml = NfeEnvEml.Pendente Else NfeEnvEml = NfeEnvEml.Nao_Enviar EndIF
//DESTINATARIO Do Case //MArketplace Case PedStsGer = Pedido_Gerado.MarketPlace NfeCliCod = PedCliNfeCod NfeCliRaz = &sdtDadosNota.PesRaz NfeCliTipPes = &sdtDadosNota.PesTip NfeCliCpf = &sdtDadosNota.PesCpf NfeCliCnpj = &sdtDadosNota.PesCnpj
Case PedCliNfeCod <> 0 and PedCliNfeCod <> PedCliCod //pega cliente da nota NfeCliCod = PedCliNfeCod NfeCliRaz = PedCliNfeNom NfeCliTipPes = PedCliNfeTip NfeCliCpf = PedCliNfeCpf NfeCliCnpj = PedCliNfeCnpj Otherwise //cliente do pedido NfeCliCod = PedCliCod //USAR OUTRO NOME DO CADASTRO DO CLIENTE if PedCliRazNF.IsEmpty() or PedCliRazNF.IsNull() NfeCliRaz = PedCliRaz Else NfeCliRaz = PedCliRazNF Endif
NfeCliTipPes = PedCliTip NfeCliCpf = PedCliCpf NfeCliCnpj = PedCliCnpj EndCase
//Endereco Destino Do Case Case PedStsGer = Pedido_Gerado.MarketPlace //RetornaInscricaoEstadualpropriedade.Call(EmpCod,PedCliNfeCod,PedPrpCod,&NfeCliIns) &EndPedCliCod = 0 //PedCliNfeCod NfeCliIns = &sdtDadosNota.MrkShipInsEst &NfeCliSuf = PedCliNfeSuf
NfeCliEnd = &sdtDadosNota.MrkShipLog NfeCliEndNro = &sdtDadosNota.MrkShipNro NfeCliBai = &sdtDadosNota.MrkShipBai NfeCliCidNom = &sdtDadosNota.MrkShipCid NfeCliCidCod = &sdtDadosNota.MrkShipCidCod NfeCliCidIbge = &sdtDadosNota.MrkShipCidIbge NfeCliCidUF = &sdtDadosNota.MrkShipUF NfeCliCep = &sdtDadosNota.MrkShipCep
//NfeCliFon = FormataFONE.Udp(PedCliNfeFon) //NfeCliCpl = ''
Case PedPrpCod <> 0 and PedCliNfeCod <> 0 and PedCliNfeCod <> PedCliCod RetornaInscricaoEstadualpropriedade.Call(EmpCod,PedCliNfeCod,PedPrpCod,&NfeCliIns) &EndPedCliCod = PedCliNfeCod NfeCliIns = &NfeCliIns &NfeCliSuf = PedCliNfeSuf
NfeCliEnd = PedPrpEnd NfeCliEndNro = PedPrpNro NfeCliBai = PedPrpBai NfeCliCidNom = PedPrpCidNom NfeCliCidCod = PedPrpCidCod NfeCliCidIbge = PedPrpCidIbge NfeCliCidUF = PedPrpCidUfeCod NfeCliCep = PedPrpCep
NfeCliFon = FormataFONE.Udp(PedCliNfeFon) NfeCliCpl = PedPrpDen
Case PedPrpCod <> 0 RetornaInscricaoEstadualpropriedade.Call(EmpCod,PedCliCod,PedPrpCod,&NfeCliIns) &EndPedCliCod = PedCliCod NfeCliIns = &NfeCliIns &NfeCliSuf = PedCliSuf
NfeCliEnd = PedPrpEnd NfeCliEndNro = PedPrpNro NfeCliBai = PedPrpBai NfeCliCidNom = PedPrpCidNom NfeCliCidCod = PedPrpCidCod NfeCliCidIbge = PedPrpCidIbge NfeCliCidUF = PedPrpCidUfeCod NfeCliCep = PedPrpCep
NfeCliFon = FormataFONE.Udp(PedCliPrmFon) NfeCliCpl = PedPrpDen
Otherwise RetornaInscricaoEstadual.Call(EmpCod,PedCliCod,&NfeCliIns) &EndPedCliCod = PedCliCod
NfeCliIns = &NfeCliIns &NfeCliSuf = PedCliSuf
NfeCliEnd = PedCliEntLog NfeCliEndNro = PedCliEntNro NfeCliBai = PedCliEntBai NfeCliCidNom = PedCliEntCidNom NfeCliCidCod = PedCliCidCod NfeCliCidIbge = PedCliEntCidIbge NfeCliCidUF = PedCliEntUfeCod NfeCliCep = PedCliEntCep
NfeCliFon = FormataFONE.Udp(PedCliPrmFon) NfeCliCpl = PedCliEntCpl EndCase
If &tmpNfeCliEntIs = True or &NfeIndPres = '1' //Utiliza endereço de entrega If &NfeIndPres = '1' //operação presecial busca endereço doetente (filial) do 'BuscaEndFilial' Else do 'BuscaEndCobranca' EndIf
NfeCliEntIs = true NfeCliEntCmp = &NfeCliEntCmp NfeCliEntBai = &NfeCliEntBai NfeCliEntCEP = &NfeCliEntCEP NfeCliEntCidCod = &NfeCliEntCidCod NfeCliEntLog = &NfeCliEntLog NfeCliEntLogNro = &NfeCliEntLogNro // NfeCliEntCidNom = &NfeCliEntCidNom // NfeCliEntCidUf = &NfeCliEntCidUf
EndIf
NfeCliSuf = &NfeCliSuf
//TRANPORTADORA &PesFonNum = retornaPrimeiroTelefone.Udp(&EmpCod, PedTraRedCod)
NfeTraCod = PedTraRedCod If &PesFonNum.IsEmpty() NfeTraRaz = PedTraRedRaz Else NfeTraRaz = PedTraRedRaz + ' - ' + &PesFonNum.Trim() EndIF
NfeTraEnd = PedTraRedLog NfeTraEndNro = PedTraRedNro NfeTraBai = PedTraRedBai NfeTraCep = PedTraRedCep NfeTraCidCod = PedTraRedCidCod NfeTraCidNom = PedTraRedCidNom NfeTraCidUfeCod = PedTraRedUfeCod NfeTraCnpj = PedTraRedCnpj NfeTraCpf = PedTraRedCPF NfeTraInsEst = PedTraRedInsEst NfeTraTipPes = PedTraRedTipPes
NfeChv = '' //CHAVE DA NFE
NfeVlrTotPro = &NfeVlrTotPro NfeVlrTotFrt = &NfeVlrTotFrt NfeVlrTotIpi = &NfeVlrTotIpi NfeVlrTot = &NfeVlrTot
//######################## Usado com nota de bloco de produtor If LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada If ((&tmpNroNfp.Trim() <> '') and (not &tmpEmsNfp.IsEmpty())) &tmpManNfeDadAdi += 'NOTA DE PRODUTOR Nº '+trim(&tmpNroNfp) +', EMITIDA EM '+ &tmpEmsNfp.ToFormattedString()+' ' Endif If &TmpTotFun > 0 NfeTotFun = &TmpTotFun Else NfeTotFun = 0 EndIf EndIf
//####################################################################
NfeNroNfp = &tmpNroNfp NfeEmsNfp = &tmpEmsNfp
NfeVlrTotSeg = &NfeVlrTotSeg NfeVlrTotOutDsp = &NfeVlrTotOutDsp
NfeVlrTotDsc = &NfeVlrTotDsc
NfeVlrTotBasIcms = &NfeVlrTotBasIcms NfeVlrTotIcms = &NfeVlrTotIcms NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt NfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt
&TotLin = GxMlines(&tmpManNfeDadAdi, 100) &NumLin = 1 Do While &NumLin <= &TotLin NfeDadAdi = NfeDadAdi.Trim() + ' ' +GxGetMLi(&tmpManNfeDadAdi, &NumLin, 100) &NumLin += 1 EndDo
&TotLin = GxMlines(&tmpAutNfeDadAdi, 100) &NumLin = 1 Do While &NumLin <= &TotLin NfeDadAdi = NfeDadAdi.Trim() + ' ' +GxGetMLi(&tmpAutNfeDadAdi, &NumLin, 100) &NumLin += 1 EndDo
NfeDadManAdi = &tmpManNfeDadAdi NfeDadAutAdi = &tmpAutNfeDadAdi
NfeQtdVol = &NfeQtdVol NfeEspVol = &NfeEspVol
NfeVlrTotPdg = 0 NfeNroVol = '' NfeMarVol = '' NfeMotNom = '' NfeTraPlaCod = '' NfeTraPlaUF = ''
NfePesLiq = &NfePesLiq NfePesBrt = &NfePesBrt
NfeEmiGnre = Status_SimNao.Nao
NfeDI = &NfeDI //NfsEstExp = &NfsEstExp EndNew
For &sdtPedidosItem in &sdtPedidos New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCodFat NfeCod = &NfeCod NfeSelPedCod = &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod EndNEw EndFor
EndFor
Commit
if &NfeIndPres = '5' //PEGA NOTA DE REMESSA. prcRetornaChavesNotasRemessa.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCodFat, &sdtNotasReferenciadas) Endif
if not &tmpNfeChvRef.IsEmpty() &sdtNotasReferenciadasItem = new() &sdtNotasReferenciadasItem.NfeDocRefNfe = retornasoNumeros.Udp(&tmpNfeChvRef) &sdtNotasReferenciadasItem.NfeDocRefMod = Substr(&tmpNfeChvRef, 21, 2) &sdtNotasReferenciadas.Add(&sdtNotasReferenciadasItem) Endif
if &sdtNotasReferenciadas.Count > 0 prcGravaDocumentosReferenciados.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCodFat, &NfeCod, &sdtNotasReferenciadas) EndIf
&NfeItmCod = 0 For Each Order tmpNFeCod, tmpNfeItmCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod Where tmpPedQtdFat > 0
&NfeItmCod += 1
New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCodFat NfeCod = &NfeCod NfeItmCod = &NfeItmCod
if tmpProOriRef.IsEmpty() NfeProCod = tmpProCod &PrOCod = tmpProCod if tmpProGraCod <> 0 NfeProGraCod = tmpProGraCod Else NfeProGraCod = 1 EndIF
NfeProNom = tmpProNom Else RetornaNomeCodigoProduto.Call(&EmpCod, tmpProOriRef, &PrOCod) NfeProCod = &PrOCod if tmpProGraCod <> 0 NfeProGraCod = tmpProGraCod Else NfeProGraCod = 1 EndIF
NfeProNom = tmpProOriNom EndiF
RetornaDadosMedicamentos.call(&EmpCod,&PrOCod,&ProMedAnv,&ProMedMot,&ProMedVlrMax)
NfeProMedAnv = &ProMedAnv NfeProMedMot = &ProMedMot NfeProMedVlrMax = &ProMedVlrMax
NfeProBar = tmpNfeProBar NfeProDadAdi = tmpNfeProDadAdi NfeNcmCod = tmpNcmCod NfeNcmCest = tmpNcmCEST NfeProVlrDig = Status_simNao.Nao //manter valores digitados
&NfeCfoCod = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(tmpCFOP) NfeCfoCod = Substr(&NfeCfoCod,1,1) + '.' + Substr(&NfeCfoCod,2,3)
NfeOriTriCod = tmpNfeOriCod NfeSitCod = tmpNfeSitCod
NfeEmbUnd = tmpUnd NfeProQtd = tmpPedQtdFat NfeProRctPen = TmpProRctPen
NfeProCBenef = tmpCBenef NfeProUFDest = tmpImpALqIcmUFDest //Difal ICMS NfeProUFDestSt = tmpImpAlqIcmStUFDest //Difal S.T
NfeProVlrUnt = tmpPedVlrUntNov NfeProVlrDsc = tmpPedVlrDsc NfeProVlrTot = tmpPedVlrTotNov
NfeProBasIcms = tmpProBasVlrIcm NfeProTaxIcms = tmpProPerIcm NfeProVlrIcms = tmpProVlrIcm NfeProTaxRedIcms = tmpProPerRedIcm
NfeProMotDes = tmpNfeMotDesIcms NfeProVlrIcmsDes = tmpProVlrIcmsDes &TotNfeProVlrIcmsDes += tmpProVlrIcmsDes //DIFERIMENTO NfeProTaxDif = tmpProPerDif NfeProVlrDif = tmpProVlrDif
//FECOP NfeProBasFCPIcmsSt = tmpProBasFCPIcmsSt NfeProVlrFCPIcmsSt = tmpProVlrFCPIcmsSt NfeProTaxFCPIcmsSt = tmpProTaxFCPIcmsSt
NfeProBasIcmsSt = tmpProBasVlrIcmSt NfeProVlrImcsSt = tmpProVlrIcmSt NfeProTaxIcmsSt = tmpProPerIcmSt //taxa st NfeProTaxRedIcmsSt = tmpProPerRedIcmSt //Reducao St
NfeProBasIpi = tmpPedVlrTotNov NfeProTaxIpi = tmpProPerIpi NfeProVlrIpi = tmpProVlrIpi
NfeProTaxIcmsRet = tmpNfeProTaxIcmsRet NfeProVlrIcmsRet = tmpNfeProVlrIcmsRet NfeProBasIcmsRet = tmpNfeProBasIcmsRet
&Numeric = val(tmpNfeCstIpi) &Varchar = Substr(&NfeCfoCod, 1, 1)
Do Case Case &Varchar in ('5','6','7') and &Numeric < 50 NfeCstIpi = '99'
Case &Varchar in ('1','2','3') and &Numeric >= 50 NfeCstIpi = '49'
otherwise NfeCstIpi = tmpNfeCstIpi Endcase NfeIpiEnq = tmpNfeIpiEnq
NfeProBasCofins = tmpProBasCofins NfeProCofinsRed = tmpProPerRedCofins NfeproVlrCofins = tmpProVlrCOFINS NfeProTaxCofins = tmpProPerCOFINS // % Cofins NfeCstCofins = tmpNfeCstCofins //CST Cofins
NfeProBasPIS = tmpProBasPIS NfeProPisRed = tmpProPerRedPis NfeProVlrPIS = tmpProVlrPIS NfeProTaxPIS = tmpProPerPIS //% PIS NfeCstPIS = tmpNfeCstPIS // CST PIS
NfeProVlrFrt = tmpProVlrFrt //Frete NfeProVlrOutDsp = tmpProVlrOut NfeProVlrApxTrib = tmpProVlrApxImp //APX TRIBUTOS
NfeProTaxMvaSt = tmpNfeProTaxMvaSt //ACRESCIMO MVA
NfeProCodAnp = tmpNfeProCodAnp NfeProDscAnp = tmpNfeProDscAnp NfeProPerGlp = tmpNfeProPerGlp NfeProPerGni = tmpNfeProPerGni NfeProPerGnn = tmpNfeProPerGnn NfeProVlrPar = tmpNfeProVlrPar
//IBS CBS NfeIbsSit = tmpNfeIbsSit NfeIbsClassTrib = tmpNfeIbsClassTrib
//Retido NfeRegIbsSit = tmpNfeRegIbsSit NfeRegIbsClassTrib = tmpNfeRegIbsClassTrib
NfeRegIbsUfeTaxEfe = tmpNfeRegIbsUfeTaxEfe NfeRegIbsUfeVlr = tmpNfeRegIbsUfeVlr NfeRegIbsMunTaxEfe = tmpNfeRegIbsMunTaxEfe NfeRegIbsMunVlr = tmpNfeRegIbsMunVlr NfeRegCbsTaxEfe = tmpNfeRegCbsTaxEfe NfeRegCbsVlr = tmpNfeRegCbsVlr
NfeIbsBas = tmpNfeIbsBas NfeIbsUfPer = tmpNfeIbsUfPer NfeIbsUfPerRed = tmpNfeIbsUfPerRed NfeIbsUfPerEfe = tmpNfeIbsUfPerEfe NfeIbsUfVlr = tmpNfeIbsUfVlr NfeIbsMunPer = tmpNfeIbsMunPer NfeIbsMunPerRed = tmpNfeIbsMunPerRed NfeIbsMunVlr = tmpNfeIbsMunVlr NfeIbsMunEfe = tmpNfeIbsMunEfe NfeCbsPer = tmpNfeCbsPer NfeCbsPerRed = tmpNfeCbsPerRed NfeCbsPerEfe = tmpNfeCbsPerEfe NfeCbsVlr = tmpNfeCbsVlr
//diferido NfeIbsUfPerDif = tmpNfeIbsUfPerDif NfeIbsUfVlrDif = tmpNfeIbsUfVlrDif NfeIbsMunPerDif = tmpNfeIbsMunPerDif NfeIbsMunVlrDif = tmpNfeIbsMunVlrDif NfeCbsPerDif = tmpNfeCbsPerDif NfeCbsVlrDif = tmpNfeCbsVlrDif
&NfeTotFPIcmsSt += tmpProVlrFCPIcmsSt //NfeProVlrSeg //RATEADO EndNew
For Each Order tmpNFeCod, tmpNfeItmCod, tmpProLotCod New NfeProLotCod = tmpProLotCod NfeProLotFab = tmpProLotFab NfeProLotVct = tmpProLotVct NfeProLotQtd = tmpProLotQtd NfeProLotGer = tmpProLotGer NfeProLotPen = tmpProLotPen NfeProLotRen = tmpProLotRen NfeProLotPms = tmpProLotPms NfeProLotPur = tmpProLotPur EndNew EndFor EndFor
commit
ObsAutomaticaNFe.call(&EmpCod, &FilCodFat, &NfeCod) GravaTotaisNF.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCodFat, &NfeCod, &NfeVlrTotDsc, 0, &NfeVlrTotOutDsp, &NfeVlrTotSeg, &NfeVlrTotFrt)
Do Case Case &EmitirConferir = 'E' //GERA SOLICITAÇÂO NA TABELA AUTORIZA NOTA //GRAVA XML AUTORIZACAO GeraXmlNFeModelo55_4.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCodFat, &NfeCod,'S', &PesCod, 'E', &SolCod)
do 'fechaPedido'
Do CAse CAse &TelaOrigem = 'VENDAREMESSA' msg('Chamar alguma tela Grava 55')
Case &TelaOrigem = 'RETURN' //JDF para obter a informacao na tela chamadora, TRANSFERENCIA &SdtNotaTransmissao.NfeCod = &NfeCod &SdtNotaTransmissao.NfeFilCod = &FilCodFat &SdtNotaTransmissao.SolCod = &SolCod PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('G', 'EMITIRNFE', &PesCod, &EmpCod, &SdtNotaTransmissao.ToJson(), &PAdDtaMod, &PAdDtaHorMod, 'T') Return Otherwise wpautorizaNotaRecepcao.Link(&TelaOrigem, &EmpCod, &FilCodFat, &NfeCod, &SolCod) EndCAse CAse &EmitirConferir = 'D'//DUPLICATA do 'fechaPedido'
GravaDuplicatasNFe.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCodFat, &NfeCod, &FilCod, &PedCod)
wpDuplicatasNFe.Link(&TelaOrigem, &EmpCod, &FilCodFat, &NfeCod)
Otherwise//ABRE TELA CONFERENCIA NOTA
do 'fechaPedido'
&WizardData.Capa.FilCod = &FilCodFat &WizardData.Capa.NfeCod = &NfeCod &WizardData.Capa.EmpCod = &EmpCod //&WizardData.Capa.SolCod = 0 &WebSession.Set('wpNota_Data', &WizardData.ToJson())
wpNota.Link('', 'Capa', false) EndCAse
Sub 'fechaPedido' if &PedSts <> Status_pedido.CANCELADO //GRAVA GNRE &PedVlrGnre = (&NfeVlrTotIcmsSt + &NfeTotFPIcmsSt)-&TotNfeProVlrIcmsDes //ANALIZAR GravaValorGnrePedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &PedVlrGnre, &NfeVlrTotIpi)
if &PedSts <> Status_pedido.FECHADO //FECHA PEDIDO AtualizaEstoqueGerencialVenda.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &HojeData, &PesCod, Status_Pedido.FECHADO) Endif
//ATUALIZAPEDIDOVINCULADO if not &PedCodOciRef.IsEmpty() AtualizaVendaFutura.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCodOciRef, VendaFutura.BloqueiaVendaFutura) Endif Endif EndSub
Sub 'BuscaEndFilial' For each Order EmpCod,FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCodFat &NfeCliEntCmp = FilCpl &NfeCliEntBai = FilBai &NfeCliEntCEP = FilCep &NfeCliEntCidCod = FilCidCod &NfeCliEntLog = FilLog &NfeCliEntLogNro = FilNro
EndFor Endsub
Sub 'BuscaEndCobranca' For each Order EmpCod,PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &EndPedCliCod Where PesIsEndEnt = true &NfeCliEntCmp = PesEntCpl &NfeCliEntBai = PesEntBai &NfeCliEntCEP = PesEntCep &NfeCliEntCidCod = PesEntCidCod &NfeCliEntLog = PesEntLog &NfeCliEntLogNro = PesEntNro
EndFor Endsub
parm(in:&TelaOrigem, in:&EmpCod, in:&FilCod, in:&PedCod, in:&tmpNFeCod, in:&PesCod, in:&EmitirConferir);
